name: gutmetrics

metadata.name: gutmetrics
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Analysis of blood metabolome prediction of gut microbiome α-diversity in humans

documentation:
# gutmetrics
A Python package for predicting gut microbiome α-diversity from blood metabolomics data, based on the research published in Blood metabolome predicts gut microbiome α-diversity in humans.

modules.name: gutmetrics.visualization.heatmaps
documentation: Heatmap visualization tools for correlation and feature importance analysis.

modules.name: gutmetrics.visualization.plots
documentation: Plotting utilities for visualizing analysis results and data distributions.

modules.name: gutmetrics.visualization
documentation: Visualization tools for omics data analysis and results.

modules.name: gutmetrics.preprocessing.cleaning
documentation: Module for cleaning and validating metabolomics and microbiome data.

functions.name: gutmetrics.preprocessing.cleaning.standardize_index
documentation:
Standardize DataFrame index to consistent format.

Args:
----
    df: Input DataFrame
    index_col: Column to use as index
    index_type: Type to cast index to

Returns:
-------
    DataFrame with standardized index

Raises:
------
    ValueError: If DataFrame is empty or contains duplicate IDs

functions.name: gutmetrics.preprocessing.cleaning.remove_outliers
documentation:
Remove outliers from a DataFrame column using the IQR method.

Args:
    data: Input DataFrame
    column: Column name to check for outliers
    n_std: Number of standard deviations to use as threshold

Returns:
    DataFrame with outliers removed

functions.name: gutmetrics.preprocessing.cleaning.validate_metabolomics_data
documentation:
Validate metabolomics data format and content.

Args:
----
    df: Metabolomics DataFrame to validate
    required_cols: List of required columns

Returns:
-------
    True if valid

Raises:
------
    ValueError: If validation fails or DataFrame is empty

functions.name: gutmetrics.preprocessing.cleaning.validate_microbiome_data
documentation:
Validate microbiome data format and content.

Args:
----
    df: Microbiome DataFrame to validate
    min_reads: Minimum number of reads required

Returns:
-------
    True if valid

Raises:
------
    ValueError: If validation fails or DataFrame is empty

functions.name: gutmetrics.preprocessing.cleaning.clean_metadata
documentation:
Clean metadata DataFrame.

Args:
----
    df: DataFrame to clean

Returns:
-------
    Cleaned DataFrame

Raises:
------
    ValueError: If required columns are missing

modules.name: gutmetrics.preprocessing
documentation: Data preprocessing and cleaning utilities for omics data.

modules.name: gutmetrics.preprocessing.scaling
documentation: Module for scaling and normalizing data.

functions.name: gutmetrics.preprocessing.scaling.scale_metabolomics
documentation:
Scale metabolomics data using StandardScaler while preserving metadata.

Args:
----
    data: Input DataFrame with metabolomics data
    exclude_cols: Columns to exclude from scaling (e.g. metadata)
    copy: Whether to copy the data before scaling

Returns:
-------
    Scaled DataFrame with same structure as input

functions.name: gutmetrics.preprocessing.scaling.scale_proteomics
documentation:
Scale proteomics data while preserving metadata columns.

Args:
----
    data: Input DataFrame with proteomics data
    metadata_cols: Metadata columns to exclude from scaling
    copy: Whether to copy the data before scaling

Returns:
-------
    Scaled DataFrame with same structure as input

functions.name: gutmetrics.preprocessing.scaling.scale_clinical_labs
documentation:
Scale clinical laboratory data while preserving metadata.

Args:
----
    data: Input DataFrame with clinical lab data
    metadata_cols: Metadata columns to exclude from scaling
    copy: Whether to copy the data before scaling

Returns:
-------
    Scaled DataFrame with same structure as input

functions.name: gutmetrics.preprocessing.scaling.scale_and_combine_omics
documentation:
Scale and combine multiple omics data types.

Args:
----
    metabolomics_data: Metabolomics DataFrame
    proteomics_data: Optional proteomics DataFrame
    clinical_data: Optional clinical labs DataFrame
    join: How to join DataFrames ('inner' or 'outer')

Returns:
-------
    Combined scaled DataFrame

functions.name: gutmetrics.preprocessing.scaling.get_scaled_feature_names
documentation:
Get names of scaled features excluding metadata columns.

Args:
----
    data: Input DataFrame
    exclude_cols: Columns to exclude

Returns:
-------
    List of scaled feature column names

modules.name: gutmetrics
documentation:
Analysis package for predicting gut microbiome alpha-diversity.

From blood metabolomics data.

modules.name: gutmetrics.analysis.correlation
documentation: Correlation analysis tools for metabolomics and microbiome data.

modules.name: gutmetrics.analysis
documentation: Statistical analysis and modeling tools for gut microbiome and metabolomics data.

modules.name: gutmetrics.analysis.classification
documentation: Classification models and utilities for microbiome diversity prediction.

modules.name: gutmetrics.analysis.regression
documentation: Regression models for predicting microbiome diversity metrics.

modules.name: gutmetrics.utils.stats
documentation: Statistical utility functions for omics data analysis.

modules.name: gutmetrics.utils
documentation: Utility functions for statistical analysis and data manipulation.
